attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL)

 minus
 select CASH_RECEIPT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CASH_RECEIPT_ID = STG_CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.CASH_RECEIPT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
